nasb.text: How the beasts groan! The herds of cattle wander aimlessly Because there is no pasture for them; Even the flocks of sheep suffer.

esv.text: How the beasts groan! The herds of cattle are perplexed because there is no pasture for them; even the flocks of sheep suffer.

cnv.text: 牲畜發出哀鳴， 牛群到處流蕩， 因為沒有草場給牠們， 羊群也同樣受苦。

ccb.text: 牲畜哀鸣， 牛群因找不到草场而四处乱窜， 羊群也受苦。
